name: linChangeWakeupSettings
title: linChangeWakeupSettings
description: This function changes the wake-up setting.
When LIN hardware is not in Sleep mode calling this function will have no effect.

parameters.name: restartScheduler
parameters.description: 0: After wake-up the current schedule table is started with the slot before entering sleep mode.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.

description: Change wake-up settings on getting Sleep mode event
